mapper.select:
SELECT ci.id, ci.register_no, ci.customer_id, ci.bed_id, ci.check_in_date, ci.contract_months, ci.deposit, ci.operator, ci.create_time, ci.update_time, c.name AS customer_name, b.bed_no AS bed_no FROM check_in ci LEFT JOIN customer c ON ci.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN bed b ON ci.bed_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE ci.deleted = 0
AND (ci.register_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.bed_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY ci.create_time DESC
